title: More Nonsense Limerick 47
content:
There was an old person of Pett,
    Who was partly consumed by regret;
    He sate in a cart, 
    And ate cold apple tart,
    Which relieved that old person of Pett.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 47", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
